subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the main idea and theme of the poem
Recognize imagery and simple poetic devices
Summarize each stanza in own words
Relate the poem to personal experiences of rain and comfort

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to the Poem
topics_covered: Theme: cozy feeling and reflection during rain
teaching_strategy: Discussion about rainy weather and emotions it evokes
student_activities: Share own experiences of listening to rain

lesson_plan.title: Stanza-wise Understanding
topics_covered: Imagery of rain and sounds on roof and shingles
Feelings and mood evoked by the poem
teaching_strategy: Explain each stanza in simple language
student_activities: Write simple meaning of each stanza in notebook

lesson_plan.title: Understanding Feelings and Imagination
topics_covered: Recollection of loved ones and memories
Connection between sounds of rain and imagination
teaching_strategy: Discussion on how rain evokes memories
Ask students to share their reflections
student_activities: Write a few sentences about a memory triggered by rain
Identify examples of imagery in poem

lesson_plan.title: Revision and Recap
teaching_strategy: Ask students to summarize poem in their own words
student_activities: Identify examples of imagery and sounds

teaching_aids: Charts showing imagery and sound devices
teacher_tip: Focus on helping students feel the poem’s atmosphere and relate it to personal experiences with rain.
